description: Design a mounting plate in FreeCAD centered on the origin (XY plane) with dimensions 200 mm (Length) x 100 mm (Width) x 8 mm (Thickness). The plate must feature a symmetric 4x2 grid of eight 5.5 mm diameter mounting holes spaced 40 mm apart along the X-axis and 60 mm apart along the Y-axis (hole center coordinates: X = ±20, ±60; Y = ±30). Save the completed model to /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/mounting_plate.FCStd.
